headline: A Look At Charter Communications (CHTR) Valuation As Revenue And Broadband Headwinds Intensify
summary: Charter Communications (CHTR) has become a focus for investors after projecting Q1 revenue and EBITDA declines, along with expected broadband subscriber losses of about 98,000, and around 400,000 forecast for 2026. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. The latest guidance on softer Q1 revenue and EBITDA, together with forecast broadband subscriber losses, comes after a tough stretch for holders. The 1 year total shareholder return shows a 42.98% decline and the 5 year total...
